---
title: 'Elevation Church - Charlotte Area, North Carolina'
date: '2012-06-06T07:15:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6076415506247738142'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/elevation-church-charlotte-area-north.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'North Carolina'
---

<a href="http://www.elevationchurch.org/" target="_blank">Elevation Church</a><br />
<a href="http://www.stevenfurtick.com/" target="_blank">Pastor Steven Furtick</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.elevationchurch.org/">http://www.elevationchurch.org/</a>
<br />
<br />
Located in several locations in and around the Charlotte North Carolina Area.
